title: Wire ToolExecutor, iteration monitors, and inbound channels into agent loop
purpose: Connect the independently-built mechanisms into the running agent loop. ToolRegistry implements ToolExecutor. Iteration monitors called during the loop. Inbound channels drained at tool boundaries. Dynamic tool availability wired to profile configuration.
task: Implement three integration points plus dynamic availability: (1) ToolRegistry implements ToolExecutor dispatching through full lifecycle. (2) Wire evaluate_iteration into loop cycle. (3) Wire inbound channel drain into tool boundaries. (4) Dynamic tool set management. Testing: Layer 2 mock provider tests.

requirements.title: ToolRegistry implements ToolExecutor
requirements.spec: ToolRegistry SHALL implement the ToolExecutor trait, dispatching through pre-validate/execute/post-validate/on-success with gate/report handling.
acceptance: ToolRegistry implements ToolExecutor
Pre-validate Block prevents execution
Post-validate Gate failure returns error without committing
Post-validate Report failure returns output with errors
On-success runs only when post-validate passes
ToolNotFound for unregistered tools

requirements.title: Wire iteration monitors into agent loop
requirements.spec: The loop SHALL call evaluate_iteration after each cycle. Signals appended as system events. HandoffTriggered injects wrap-up guidance.
acceptance: evaluate_iteration called once per loop iteration
TokenWarning appends system event
HandoffTriggered injects wrap-up UserMessage
Test triggers a token warning and verifies event in store

requirements.title: Wire inbound channels into tool boundaries
requirements.spec: The loop SHALL drain the inbound channel after each tool batch. Steer messages injected before next provider call. Follow-up messages held until model would stop.
acceptance: Inbound channel drained after tool batch
Steer messages become UserMessage events before next call
Follow-up messages injected only when loop would return Completed
Test sends Steer mid-loop, verifies in next context
Test sends Follow-up, verifies loop continues

requirements.title: Dynamic tool availability
requirements.spec: ToolRegistry SHALL support set_available to restrict active tools without removing them.
acceptance: set_available(names) restricts get() results
Unavailable tools return ToolNotFound
reset_available() restores all
Test: register 3, set available 1, verify only 1 accessible

requirements.title: ToolRegistry runtime mutation
requirements.spec: ToolRegistry SHALL support adding and removing tools at runtime.
acceptance: register() adds immediately available tool
remove() returns Option<Box<dyn Tool>>
get() after remove returns None
Test: add tool at runtime, verify execution

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement specific tool logic
SHALL NOT modify Provider trait or MockProvider
verification: All existing tests still pass plus new integration tests
Full lifecycle dispatch verified by test with mock tool having all 4 phases
